title: The Church Tower Flare Witness
description: Two soldiers from Company B independently report seeing a green pyrotechnic flare fired from the Cantigny church tower at approximately 06:00 — before American troops had reached the church. The meaning of the flare is unclear, though several soldiers later speculated it may have been some form of pre-arranged signal. The flare was fired from inside the tower, not from the ground, and required someone to have been inside the church before the assault wave arrived.
